name: The Theory of Strategic Evolution: Games with Endogenous Players and Strategic Replicators

description: arXiv:2512.07901v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Von Neumann founded both game theory and the theory of self-reproducing automata, but the two programs never merged. This paper provides the synthesis. The Theory of Strategic Evolution analyzes strategic replicators: entities that optimize under resource constraints and spawn copies of themselves. We introduce Games with Endogenous Play...
author: Kevin Vallier
